So, what do we do?

What don’t we do? We offer a complete range of marketing services focused in a select few industries. We design, brand, advertise, announce, launch—do whatever it takes to build a successful platform for your brand to evolve and grow.

Marketing Strategy
We plan a lot and we love to make plans for our clients. Marketing plans, that is. We develop strategies that bring you and your audience closer together at every turn.
Branding
We dig deep to uncover the core of your brand. Then, we boldly tell your story to your customers. More than a logo, colors or typography, we believe your brand is your soul.
Advertising
Our secret recipe for advertising? Tell the truth. But tell it in a way so compelling it can’t be ignored. There’s something about great advertising that entertains as well as sells.
Digital
We bring web design, content, and human interaction together in award-winning fashion. HSP and SoMe Connect will enhance your marketing efforts with planning, developing, and executing SEO, PPC, email campaigns, and social media.
Design
To say we are typography nerds, color fanatics or spatial-relationship gurus would be a gross understatement. We put our hearts into crafting every design piece so it’s unique, bold and memorable.
Publishing
If you write it, we will publish. We design book covers and layout pages. Everything from pagination to marketing and PR, we get your book out there.
Sustainability
At Henderson Shapiro, Inc. we are committed to practicing sustainable business operations in every aspect of our company. We believe that it is our responsibility to contribute to the preservation of our planet for future generations. By prioritizing sustainability, we are not only doing our part to protect the environment, but we are also setting an example for others in our industry to follow.

Industries

HealthCare
We live in the healthcare space, from working closely with doctors and hospitals to healthcare benefits to pharmaceutical advertising. We understand the ever-changing landscape. Our experience lies in B2B, B2C and our newly-created category, B2D (business to doctor).
Technology & Communications
A majority of our work is in technology. We work with major wireless carriers and consumer product manufacturers developing marketing, packaging, collateral, POP and whatever else the day brings. We see ourselves as dedicated partners solving problems everyday.
Building, Construction & Sustainability
We have developed a strong footing in building and construction. With a wide variety of clients such as builders, manufacturers, and service providers, we work with leaders in the industry developing branding, collateral, advertising, digital and social media.
Non-Profit
We have been called on to promote large fundraising events for several of the area’s leading non-profits and have found a niche there. We take pride in working for good causes. Our background, skill set and culture enables this to be a natural fit for our firm.

Why We Do It

To provide unmatched marketing support and strategy, based on integrity and dedication, striving always to exceed expectations.
